# MessageSquareDot

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::MessageSquareDot;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        MessageSquareDot { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
unread, unresolved, comment, chat, conversation, dialog, feedback, speech bubble

## Categories
social, notifications
